elements.code:
direction down
colorMode bold
styleMode shadow
typeface clean

Tenant [icon: user]
Admin [icon: user]

AgentMail [icon: email, color: blue]
Webhook [label: "Webhook API", icon: api]

COI App [icon: next-js, color: green] {
  Dashboard [label: "Next.js Admin UI", icon: browser]
  REST API [label: "REST API Routes", icon: api]
}

NeonDB [label: "Neon Postgres", icon: postgresql]
Cloudinary [icon: cloud]
Redis [label: "Upstash Redis", icon: redis]

Worker [icon: server, color: orange] {
  ProcessJob [label: "process-coi", icon: cog]
  EmailJob [label: "send-template-email", icon: mail]
}

AI [icon: brain, color: purple] {
  OCR [label: "LlamaParse OCR", icon: file-text]
  Agents [label: "5 AI Agents + Guardrails", icon: robot]
}

Groq [label: "Groq LLM", icon: ai]

Tenant > AgentMail
AgentMail > Webhook
Webhook > REST API
Admin > Dashboard
Dashboard > REST API
REST API > NeonDB
REST API > Cloudinary
REST API > Redis
Redis > ProcessJob
ProcessJob > Cloudinary

OCR > Agents

ProcessJob > NeonDB
Dashboard > EmailJob

EmailJob > NeonDB
AgentMail > Tenant
